summary: Iteration 147 - P0 Bug Fix: Story-to-Video Background Task with Polling VERIFIED. Image and voice generation endpoints now use background tasks with polling pattern. All 16 backend tests pass. Frontend polling flow correctly implemented.

minor.issue: First request to image generation for an existing project took 57s response time (unclear if K8s timeout issue or FastAPI background task quirk)
minor.note: Subsequent requests to endpoint (with 404 for non-existent project) return in ~0.1s as expected. The 57s may have been due to connection staying open while background task initialized.

integration_issues.issue: WebSocket shows 'Offline' status (error 1006). Falls back to HTTP polling correctly.

action_items: Monitor first POST /images request response time in production - may need to investigate if FastAPI background task is blocking
WebSocket connection failing with 1006 error - investigate if this is a proxy/ingress issue
critical_code_review_comments: Image generation (Lines 392-464) correctly returns job_id immediately and uses background_tasks.add_task()
Voice generation (Lines 821-890) correctly returns job_id immediately and uses background_tasks.add_task()
Status polling endpoints (Lines 467-491 for images, 893-915 for voices) return proper job status with progress
Smart prompt truncation (Lines 261-288) provides defense-in-depth for long prompts
Frontend polling (StoryVideoStudio.js Lines 636-665) correctly polls every 3s until COMPLETED/FAILED
Credit deduction happens ONCE at start (before background task), refunds on failure in background task
All generated images stored in R2 cloud with full HTTPS URLs

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Story Video Studio page loads correctly, polling flow implemented

test_credentials.consumption_breakdown: 50 credits (5 images × 10) + 10 credits (5 voices × ~2 credits each)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Background task polling flow is working. Image job 012fc279-9d43-43b7-8f95-779eb6140ab2 completed with 5 images. Voice job beb0bab6-4157-4a68-b960-70f08a09d943 completed with 5 voices. All stored in R2. Test user now has 62 credits remaining.

image_generation_polling.images_stored_in_r2: YES (all 5 images have R2 public URLs)

voice_generation_polling.polling_works: YES (status endpoint returns progress, COMPLETED status)
voice_generation_polling.voices_stored_in_r2: YES (all 5 voices have R2 public URLs)

credit_management.deduction_at_start: YES (50 credits deducted before image generation)
credit_management.no_duplicate_deductions: Verified - single deduction recorded in credit_transactions
